heading: Authorization of appropriations
label: 290f Authorization of appropriations
text: There are authorized to be appropriated to carry out this chapter, $1.86 million for the fiscal year ending . Notwithstanding the provisions of any other law, no appropriations for any fiscal year may be made for the purpose of this chapter after fiscal year 1969 unless previously authorized by legislation hereafter enacted by the Congress.June 30, 1969
